    inventory_status            VARCHAR(50)
);","executionOrder":2,"title":""},{"script":"CREATE TABLE bronze_shipment_returns_analytics (

    shipment_distance_km        VARCHAR(50),
    return_status               VARCHAR(50)
);","executionOrder":3,"title":""},{"script":"CREATE TABLE gold_customer_sales_analytics (

    return_id                   VARCHAR(50),
    refund_amount               DECIMAL(15,2),

);","executionOrder":4,"title":""},{"script":"CREATE TABLE gold_inventory_manufacturing_analytics (

    defect_percentage           DECIMAL(10,2),

);","executionOrder":5,"title":""},{"script":"CREATE TABLE gold_shipment_returns_analytics (

Server","displayRows":50,"dependencies":[],"className":"com.datagaps.dataflow.models.DBScriptComponent","dataSourceLogicalName":"","executionOption":"","excludeNotification":"N"},{"schemaName":"dbo","sourceDataFrame":"bronze_customer_sales_analytics","saveMode":"overwrite","numPartitions":0,"mapping":[{"sourceColumn":"product_id","sourceType":"string","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"product_id","targetType":"varchar","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"product_name","sourceType":"string","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"product_name","targetType":"varchar","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"supplier_name","sourceType":"string","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"supplier_name","targetType":"varchar","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"batch_id","sourceType":"string","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"batch_id","targetType":"varchar","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"manufacturing_plant","sourceType":"string","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"manufacturing_plant","targetType":"varchar","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"production_line","sourceType":"string","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"production_line","targetType":"varchar","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"planned_quantity","sourceType":"string","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"planned_quantity","targetType":"varchar","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"actual_quantity","sourceType":"string","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"actual_quantity","targetType":"varchar","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"defective_quantity","sourceType":"string","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"defective_quantity","targetType":"varchar","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"warehouse_name","sourceType":"string","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"warehouse_name","targetType":"varchar","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"available_quantity","sourceType":"string","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"available_quantity","targetType":"varchar","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"damaged_quantity","sourceType":"string","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"damaged_quantity","targetType":"varchar","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"stock_value","sourceType":"string","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"stock_value","targetType":"varchar","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"quality_check_status","sourceType":"string","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"quality_check_status","targetType":"varchar","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"inventory_status","sourceType":"string","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"inventory_status","targetType":"varchar","orginalTargetType":"varchar"}],"componentId":3,"componentName":"DB sink 3","tableName":"bronze_inventory_manufacturing_analytics","category":"Sink","componentType":"DB sink","rank":0,"dataSourceName":"AWS Microsoft SQL Server","displayRows":0,"dependencies":[],"className":"com.datagaps.dataflow.models.DBSyncComponent","dataSourceLogicalName":"","executionOption":"","excludeNotification":"N"},{"partitionOptions":{"partitionType":"","name":""},"enableTrim":"N","easyQueryDefJson":{"sqlQuery":""},"isAutoRepartition":"Y","databaseName":"","failComponentWhenDatasetEmpty":"N","maskDataColumns":"","componentId":6,"componentName":"JDBC 6","tableName":"JDBC_6","category":"Source","componentType":"JDBC","rank":0,"dataSourceName":"AWS Microsoft SQL Server","displayRows":50,"dependencies":[],"options":{"dbTable":"SELECT
    COALESCE(TRIM(c.customer_id), 'UNKNOWN')                AS customer_id,
    COALESCE(TRIM(c.customer_name), 'UNKNOWN')              AS customer_name,
    COALESCE(TRIM(c.customer_type), 'UNKNOWN')              AS customer_type,

    COALESCE(TRIM(so.sales_order_id), 'UNKNOWN')            AS sales_order_id,
    COALESCE(TRIM(so.product_id), 'UNKNOWN')                AS product_id,

    CASE
        WHEN so.order_date IS NULL OR TRIM(so.order_date) = ''
            THEN CAST('1900-01-01' AS DATE)
        ELSE CAST(so.order_date AS DATE)
    END                                                     AS order_date,

    CASE
        WHEN so.total_order_amount IS NULL
             OR TRIM(so.total_order_amount) = ''
            THEN 0.00
        ELSE CAST(so.total_order_amount AS DECIMAL(15,2))
    END                                                     AS total_order_amount,

    CASE
        WHEN so.discount_percentage IS NULL
             OR TRIM(so.discount_percentage) = ''
            THEN 0
        ELSE CAST(so.discount_percentage AS INT)
    END                                                     AS discount_percentage,

    COALESCE(TRIM(ls.shipment_id), 'NOT_SHIPPED')           AS shipment_id,

    COALESCE(TRIM(ls.delivery_status), 'PENDING')           AS delivery_status,

    CASE
        WHEN ls.shipment_date IS NULL
             OR TRIM(ls.shipment_date) = ''
            THEN CAST('1900-01-01' AS DATE)
        ELSE CAST(ls.shipment_date AS DATE)
    END                                                     AS shipment_date,

    COALESCE(TRIM(lr.return_id), 'NO_RETURN')               AS return_id,

    CASE
        WHEN lr.refund_amount IS NULL
             OR TRIM(lr.refund_amount) = ''
            THEN 0.00
        ELSE CAST(lr.refund_amount AS DECIMAL(15,2))
    END                                                     AS refund_amount,

    COALESCE(TRIM(lr.return_status), 'NO_RETURN')           AS return_status,

    COALESCE(TRIM(c.customer_status), 'ACTIVE')             AS customer_status

FROM sales_orders_bronze so

LEFT JOIN customer_bronze c
    ON so.customer_id = c.customer_id

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT shipment_id,
           sales_order_id,
           delivery_status,
           shipment_date
    FROM (
        SELECT
            sh.*,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY sh.sales_order_id
                ORDER BY sh.shipment_date DESC
            ) AS rn
        FROM shipment_details_bronze sh
    ) x
    WHERE rn = 1
) ls
ON so.sales_order_id = ls.sales_order_id

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT return_id,
           sales_order_id,
           refund_amount,
           return_status
    FROM (
        SELECT
            r.*,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY r.sales_order_id
                ORDER BY r.return_id DESC
            ) AS rn
        FROM returns_bronze r
    ) y
    WHERE rn = 1
) lr
ON so.sales_order_id = lr.sales_order_id;"},"className":"com.datagaps.dataflow.models.JDBCComponent","dataSourceLogicalName":"","executionOption":"","excludeNotification":"N"},{"partitionOptions":{"partitionType":"","name":""},"enableTrim":"N","easyQueryDefJson":{"sqlQuery":""},"isAutoRepartition":"Y","databaseName":"","failComponentWhenDatasetEmpty":"N","maskDataColumns":"","componentId":8,"componentName":"JDBC 8","tableName":"JDBC_8","category":"Source","componentType":"JDBC","rank":0,"dataSourceName":"AWS Microsoft SQL Server","displayRows":50,"dependencies":[],"options":{"dbTable":"SELECT DISTINCT
    COALESCE(TRIM(product_id), 'UNKNOWN')                    AS product_id,

    COALESCE(TRIM(product_name), 'UNKNOWN')                  AS product_name,

    COALESCE(TRIM(supplier_name), 'UNKNOWN')                 AS supplier_name,

    COALESCE(TRIM(batch_id), 'NO_BATCH')                     AS batch_id,

    COALESCE(TRIM(manufacturing_plant), 'UNKNOWN_PLANT')     AS manufacturing_plant,

    COALESCE(TRIM(production_line), 'UNKNOWN_LINE')          AS production_line,

    CAST(planned_quantity AS INT)                            AS planned_quantity,

    CAST(actual_quantity AS INT)                             AS actual_quantity,

    CAST(defective_quantity AS INT)                          AS defective_quantity,

    COALESCE(TRIM(warehouse_name), 'UNKNOWN_WAREHOUSE')      AS warehouse_name,

    CAST(available_quantity AS INT)                          AS available_quantity,

    CAST(damaged_quantity AS INT)                            AS damaged_quantity,

    CAST(stock_value AS INT)                                 AS stock_value,

    ROUND(
        (CAST(defective_quantity AS DECIMAL(10,2))
        / CAST(planned_quantity AS DECIMAL(10,2))) * 100,
        2
    )                                                        AS defect_percentage,

    COALESCE(TRIM(inventory_status), 'UNKNOWN')              AS inventory_status

FROM bronze_inventory_manufacturing_analytics

WHERE
    planned_quantity IS NOT NULL
    AND actual_quantity IS NOT NULL
    AND defective_quantity IS NOT NULL
    AND available_quantity IS NOT NULL
    AND damaged_quantity IS NOT NULL
    AND stock_value IS NOT NULL

    AND TRIM(planned_quantity) <> ''
    AND TRIM(actual_quantity) <> ''
    AND TRIM(defective_quantity) <> ''
    AND TRIM(available_quantity) <> ''
    AND TRIM(damaged_quantity) <> ''
    AND TRIM(stock_value) <> ''

    AND planned_quantity NOT LIKE '%[^0-9]%'
    AND actual_quantity NOT LIKE '%[^0-9]%'
    AND defective_quantity NOT LIKE '%[^0-9]%'
    AND available_quantity NOT LIKE '%[^0-9]%'
    AND damaged_quantity NOT LIKE '%[^0-9]%'
    AND stock_value NOT LIKE '%[^0-9]%'

    AND CAST(planned_quantity AS INT) > 0;"},"className":"com.datagaps.dataflow.models.JDBCComponent","dataSourceLogicalName":"","executionOption":"","excludeNotification":"N"},{"schemaName":"dbo","sourceDataFrame":"JDBC_8","saveMode":"overwrite","numPartitions":0,"mapping":[{"sourceColumn":"product_id","sourceType":"string","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"product_id","targetType":"varchar","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"product_name","sourceType":"string","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"product_name","targetType":"varchar","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"supplier_name","sourceType":"string","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"supplier_name","targetType":"varchar","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"batch_id","sourceType":"string","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"batch_id","targetType":"varchar","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"manufacturing_plant","sourceType":"string","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"manufacturing_plant","targetType":"varchar","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"production_line","sourceType":"string","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"production_line","targetType":"varchar","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"planned_quantity","sourceType":"integer","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"integer","targetColumn":"planned_quantity","targetType":"int","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"int"},{"sourceColumn":"actual_quantity","sourceType":"integer","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"integer","targetColumn":"actual_quantity","targetType":"int","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"int"},{"sourceColumn":"defective_quantity","sourceType":"integer","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"integer","targetColumn":"defective_quantity","targetType":"int","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"int"},{"sourceColumn":"warehouse_name","sourceType":"string","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"warehouse_name","targetType":"varchar","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"available_quantity","sourceType":"integer","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"integer","targetColumn":"available_quantity","targetType":"int","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"int"},{"sourceColumn":"damaged_quantity","sourceType":"integer","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"integer","targetColumn":"damaged_quantity","targetType":"int","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"int"},{"sourceColumn":"stock_value","sourceType":"integer","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"integer","targetColumn":"stock_value","targetType":"int","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"int"},{"sourceColumn":"defect_percentage","sourceType":"decimal(27,13)","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"decimal(27,13)","targetColumn":"defect_percentage","targetType":"decimal","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"decimal"},{"sourceColumn":"inventory_status","sourceType":"string","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"inventory_status","targetType":"varchar","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"varchar"}],"componentId":9,"componentName":"DB sink 9","tableName":"gold_inventory_manufacturing_analytics","category":"Sink","componentType":"DB sink","rank":0,"dataSourceName":"AWS Microsoft SQL Server","displayRows":0,"dependencies":[],"className":"com.datagaps.dataflow.models.DBSyncComponent","dataSourceLogicalName":"","executionOption":"","excludeNotification":"N"},{"partitionOptions":{"partitionType":"","name":""},"enableTrim":"N","easyQueryDefJson":{"sqlQuery":""},"isAutoRepartition":"Y","databaseName":"","failComponentWhenDatasetEmpty":"N","maskDataColumns":"","componentId":10,"componentName":"JDBC 10","tableName":"JDBC_10","category":"Source","componentType":"JDBC","rank":0,"dataSourceName":"AWS Microsoft SQL Server","displayRows":50,"dependencies":[],"options":{"dbTable":"SELECT
    sh.shipment_id,
    sh.sales_order_id,

    c.customer_id,
    c.customer_name,

    sh.courier_partner,
    sh.shipment_date,
    sh.actual_delivery_date,
    sh.delivery_status,

    r.return_id,
    r.return_reason,
    r.refund_amount,
    r.refund_status,

    sh.shipping_cost,
    sh.shipment_distance_km,

    r.return_status

FROM shipment_details_bronze sh

LEFT JOIN sales_orders_bronze so
    ON sh.sales_order_id = so.sales_order_id

LEFT JOIN customer_bronze c
    ON so.customer_id = c.customer_id

LEFT JOIN returns_bronze r
    ON sh.sales_order_id = r.sales_order_id;"},"className":"com.datagaps.dataflow.models.JDBCComponent","dataSourceLogicalName":"","executionOption":"","excludeNotification":"N"},{"partitionOptions":{"partitionType":"","name":""},"enableTrim":"N","easyQueryDefJson":{"sqlQuery":""},"isAutoRepartition":"Y","databaseName":"","failComponentWhenDatasetEmpty":"N","maskDataColumns":"","componentId":12,"componentName":"JDBC 12","tableName":"JDBC_12","category":"Source","componentType":"JDBC","rank":0,"dataSourceName":"AWS Microsoft SQL Server","displayRows":50,"dependencies":[],"options":{"dbTable":"SELECT DISTINCT
    COALESCE(TRIM(shipment_id), 'UNKNOWN')                 AS shipment_id,

    COALESCE(TRIM(sales_order_id), 'UNKNOWN')              AS sales_order_id,

    COALESCE(TRIM(customer_id), 'UNKNOWN')                 AS customer_id,

    COALESCE(TRIM(customer_name), 'UNKNOWN')               AS customer_name,

    COALESCE(TRIM(courier_partner), 'UNKNOWN')             AS courier_partner,

    CAST(shipment_date AS DATE)                            AS shipment_date,

    CAST(actual_delivery_date AS DATE)                     AS actual_delivery_date,

    COALESCE(TRIM(delivery_status), 'PENDING')             AS delivery_status,

    COALESCE(TRIM(return_id), 'NO_RETURN')                 AS return_id,

    COALESCE(TRIM(return_reason), 'NO_REASON')             AS return_reason,

    CAST(refund_amount AS DECIMAL(15,2))                   AS refund_amount,

    COALESCE(TRIM(refund_status), 'NOT_REFUNDED')          AS refund_status,

    CAST(shipping_cost AS DECIMAL(15,2))                   AS shipping_cost,

    DATEDIFF(
        DAY,
        CAST(shipment_date AS DATE),
        CAST(actual_delivery_date AS DATE)
    )                                                      AS delivery_delay_days,

    COALESCE(TRIM(return_status), 'NO_RETURN')             AS return_status

FROM bronze_shipment_returns_analytics

WHERE
    shipment_date IS NOT NULL
    AND actual_delivery_date IS NOT NULL
    AND shipping_cost IS NOT NULL
    AND refund_amount IS NOT NULL

    AND TRIM(shipment_date) <> ''
    AND TRIM(actual_delivery_date) <> ''
    AND TRIM(shipping_cost) <> ''
    AND TRIM(refund_amount) <> ''

    AND shipping_cost NOT LIKE '%[^0-9.]%'
    AND refund_amount NOT LIKE '%[^0-9.]%';"},"className":"com.datagaps.dataflow.models.JDBCComponent","dataSourceLogicalName":"","executionOption":"","excludeNotification":"N"},{"schemaName":"dbo","sourceDataFrame":"JDBC_12","saveMode":"overwrite","numPartitions":0,"mapping":[{"sourceColumn":"shipment_id","sourceType":"string","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"shipment_id","targetType":"varchar","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"sales_order_id","sourceType":"string","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"sales_order_id","targetType":"varchar","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"customer_id","sourceType":"string","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"customer_id","targetType":"varchar","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"customer_name","sourceType":"string","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"customer_name","targetType":"varchar","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"courier_partner","sourceType":"string","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"courier_partner","targetType":"varchar","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"shipment_date","sourceType":"date","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"date","targetColumn":"shipment_date","targetType":"date","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"date"},{"sourceColumn":"actual_delivery_date","sourceType":"date","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"date","targetColumn":"actual_delivery_date","targetType":"date","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"date"},{"sourceColumn":"delivery_status","sourceType":"string","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"delivery_status","targetType":"varchar","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"return_id","sourceType":"string","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"return_id","targetType":"varchar","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"return_reason","sourceType":"string","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"return_reason","targetType":"varchar","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"refund_amount","sourceType":"decimal(15,2)","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"decimal(15,2)","targetColumn":"refund_amount","targetType":"decimal","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"decimal"},{"sourceColumn":"refund_status","sourceType":"string","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"refund_status","targetType":"varchar","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"varchar"},{"sourceColumn":"shipping_cost","sourceType":"decimal(15,2)","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"decimal(15,2)","targetColumn":"shipping_cost","targetType":"decimal","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"decimal"},{"sourceColumn":"delivery_delay_days","sourceType":"integer","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"integer","targetColumn":"delivery_delay_days","targetType":"int","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"int"},{"sourceColumn":"return_status","sourceType":"string","sourceDataFormat":"","sourceTypeChange":"N","originalSourceType":"string","targetColumn":"return_status","targetType":"varchar","targetDataFormat":"","targetTypeChange":"N","orginalTargetType":"varchar"}],"componentId":13,"componentName":"DB     p.product_id,
    p.product_name,

    s.supplier_name,

    mb.batch_id,
    mb.manufacturing_plant,
    mb.production_line,
    mb.planned_quantity,
    mb.actual_quantity,
    mb.defective_quantity,

    inv.warehouse_name,
    inv.available_quantity,
    inv.damaged_quantity,
    inv.stock_value,

    CASE
        WHEN inv.damaged_quantity > 0
            THEN 'FAILED'
        ELSE 'PASSED'
    END AS quality_check_status,

    inv.inventory_status

FROM product_bronze p

    ON p.supplier_id = s.supplier_id

    ON p.product_id = mb.product_id

LEFT JOIN inventory_stock_bronze inv
    ON p.product_id =
